# Scroll Area

## Native basis

CSS overflow with custom-styled scrollbars.

## Native Web APIs

- [`overflow`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/overflow) — scrollable container
- [`::-webkit-scrollbar`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/::-webkit-scrollbar) — custom scrollbar styling

## Structure

```html
<div class="scroll-area" style="height:12rem;"><!-- long content --></div>
```
